    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    OutboxEvent
    OutboxEvent.Builder.build()
    Builds the OutboxEvent and applies defaults for unset optional fields.
    Methods in io.github.lobofoltran.outbox with parameters of type OutboxEvent
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    Outbox.publish(OutboxEvent event)
    Persists the given event to the outbox table.
    Method parameters in io.github.lobofoltran.outbox with type arguments of type OutboxEvent
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    default void
    Outbox.publishAll(Iterable<OutboxEvent> events)
    Persists every event in events to the outbox table, atomically with respect to the caller's transaction.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    OutboxInsert.bind(OutboxEvent event, UUID resolvedId)
    Binds the event to the statement using the dialect's chosen parameter order.
    default void
    OutboxDialect.validate(OutboxEvent event)
    Validates that event fits this dialect's underlying column constraints (width, byte length, character set, etc.) and throws OutboxDataException otherwise.
